valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Wed 10 Jun 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Thu 11 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low just northwest of Norway 995 expected 200 miles east of Iceland with little change by 1800 Wednesday. Low 175 miles west of Bailey 996 losing its identity by same time
